mapper.insert: insert into wf_process_instance (id, process_id, creator, create_time, parent_id, parent_node_name, expire_time, last_update_time, last_updator, variable, version) values (#{id}, #{processId}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{parentId}, #{parentNodeName}, #{expireTime}, #{lastUpdateTime}, #{lastUpdator}, #{variable}, #{version})
mapper.update: update wf_process_instance set last_updator = #{lastUpdator}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, variable = #{variable}, expire_time = #{expireTime}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id} and version = #{version}
mapper.select: select o.id, o.process_id, o.creator, o.create_time, o.parent_id, o.parent_node_name, o.expire_time, o.last_update_time, o.last_updator, o.priority, o.variable, o.version from wf_process_instance o where id = #{instanceId}
